note: Illustrative, conservative, and TUNABLE assumptions for the HeatGuard business case. All USD. These exist to make the productivity + compliance economics explicit for a pitch; every figure is labelled and adjustable, and the headline ROI is shown on a conservative subset (productivity + AKI + fines + recovered safe work) that excludes the death and turnover terms.
daily_value_note: Loaded value of a worker-day to the contractor (wage + overhead + output), deliberately conservative for low-wage Gulf construction labour.
aki_case_cost_note: Medical care + lost work + temporary replacement per acute-kidney-injury case avoided.
heat_death_note: Compensation/settlement + investigation + reputational cost per heat death. Deaths-per-AKI-case is a conservative severity ratio. Excluded from the headline ROI; shown separately.
fine_per_worker_note: AED 5,000 (UAE midday-ban fine per worker) in USD.
fine_note: Expected per-season probability of a fine the tamper-evident compliance log helps avoid.
turnover_note: Recruitment/onboarding cost and the share reduced by better conditions. Excluded from the headline ROI; shown separately.
